articles.title: Big Music Festival in Sunderland with Famous DJs
articles.summary: A big music festival called Radio 1's Big Weekend is coming to Sunderland in May. On the first day, famous DJs Fatboy Slim and Sonny Fodera will be the main performers. They play fun dance music that people love. Other musicians like FISHER, Clementine Douglas, and MK will also perform. The festival happens in Herrington Country Park over three days. Tickets went on sale, and local people got to buy them first. Fatboy Slim is known for hits like Praise You. The festival is for music fans to enjoy live shows. More performers will be announced later. Kids can go with adults on some days.

articles.title: A Wacky Song for Eurovision
articles.summary: Look Mum No Computer is a musician who will sing for the UK in the Eurovision Song Contest. His song is called Eins, Zwei, Drei and it is very unusual and fun. It has German words and talks about desserts like roly poly. He is surprised the BBC picked his song because it is not like normal pop songs. The UK has not done well in Eurovision lately, with some singers getting no votes from people. Sam Battle, his real name, says he will try his best and be himself. He hopes people like him even if the UK is not a favorite. The song is crazy and different to stand out in the contest.

articles.title: Tennis Players in a Dangerous Place
articles.summary: Tennis players went to a tournament in Fujairah, a city in the United Arab Emirates. While they were there, there was a conflict in the Middle East with attacks nearby. They heard explosions and saw smoke from an oil terminal that caught fire after a drone attack. The players were scared and did not want to play, but the ATP, which organizes tennis events, said it was safe. Later, the tournament was canceled because it was too dangerous. Some players had to quickly leave, but two players and their coaches got stuck and could not go home. The players felt unsafe and confused about why the tournament was allowed to happen.

articles.title: Cillian Murphy Talks About Peaky Blinders Movie
articles.summary: Cillian Murphy is an actor who plays Tommy Shelby in Peaky Blinders, a TV show about gangsters in Birmingham. He is now in a new movie called Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man. He says it is humbling to see how much fans love the show. The fans helped make the show popular without much promotion. The movie comes out four years after the TV show ended. In the movie, Tommy Shelby is alone in a big house during World War Two, and he has to face his past. New actors like Barry Keoghan join the movie. The creator, Steven Knight, says the cast is great and fans are loyal. The movie will be in cinemas for two weeks so fans can watch it together before it goes on Netflix.

articles.title: Britney Spears Gets in Trouble for Driving
articles.summary: Britney Spears, a famous singer, was arrested in California because police thought she was driving under the influence of alcohol and drugs. She was driving her car very fast and in a strange way on a highway. The police stopped her and did tests to check if she was impaired. She was taken to jail but released the next morning. She has to go to court in May. Her representative said this was a bad incident and Britney will follow the law and get help. Her family wants to support her. The police are still investigating. Britney deleted her Instagram account after the news came out. She is known for songs like "Baby One More Time" and "Toxic."

articles.title: British Tennis Players Win at Indian Wells
articles.summary: Two British tennis players, Sonay Kartal and Jacob Fearnley, won their first matches at the Indian Wells tournament in California. Kartal beat Lanlana Tararudee from Thailand in two sets, and Fearnley beat Damir Dzumhur from Bosnia in two sets. They will play more matches next. Another British player, Fran Jones, lost her match to Kayla Day from America. Emma Raducanu will start playing on Friday. Venus Williams, a famous American player, lost her match to Diane Parry from France. She said the windy weather made it hard to play. This tournament is a big tennis event.
